body:
### Distinct Failure
The wallpaper display grid in the "Change wallpaper" screen (accessible via right-click on desktop) cuts off the 3rd row of wallpaper options. Additionally, the window title is "Display Properties" instead of "Desktop Wallpaper".

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Right-click on the desktop.
2. Select "Change wallpaper".
3. Observe that the grid of wallpaper options cuts off the bottom row.
4. Observe that the window title is "Display Properties".

### Expected Behavior
- The "Desktop Wallpaper" window should be tall enough to fully display the 3x3 grid of wallpaper options.
- The window title should be "Desktop Wallpaper".

### Environment
- OS: Windows
title: [Bug]: Wallpaper grid row cut off and incorrect window title
